subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: Now if the beloved ones of God would act in accordance with that first tradition, namely, one of the Tablets of the Ancient Beauty, may His glory be exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حالا اگر احبای الهی بهمان حدیث اول یعنی به یکی از الواح جمال قدم جل جلاله عامل باشند
